title: stachys × petiolata
intro: Stachys × petiolata, also known as Wood Betony, is a hybrid plant species within the mint family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Wood Betony include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Wood Betony can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
